suggestions.title: Stage the new six-repo submodule layout before the old modules disappear
suggestions.description: This repo was cloned and reset this morning, and the current index deletes `VScodeConfig@Flutter` plus `🔽JobsSoftware.MacOS` while `.gitmodules` is blank. Codex can turn the new downloader’s `SUBMODULE_REPO_URLS` list into a coherent staged migration instead of leaving the repo half-swapped.
suggestions.prompt: Finish the submodule migration in this repo. Use `【MacOS】⏬下载配置当前Git子模块.command` as the source of truth, regenerate the correct `.gitmodules` entries and gitlinks for the listed repos, and leave me with a clean staged change instead of the current state where `.gitmodules` is empty and the old submodules are being deleted.

suggestions.title: Replace the legacy one-submodule add script before it rewrites this repo wrong
suggestions.description: The older `【MacOS】⬆️Git添加子模块.command` still hard-codes `VScodeConfigByFlutter` and a single `VScodeConfig@Flutter` path, even though you created a new multi-submodule flow today. Codex can rewrite or retire it now so the next run does not recreate the old layout by mistake.
suggestions.prompt: Update `【MacOS】⬆️Git添加子模块.command` so it matches the new multi-submodule layout, or remove it if it is now dangerous. Keep the useful safety behavior, but make sure it no longer points at `VScodeConfigByFlutter` or assumes there is only one submodule.

suggestions.title: Make the new downloader preview destructive steps before first real use
suggestions.description: Today’s new downloader defaults to deleting conflict paths and resetting the parent repo before syncing submodules. Codex can add a first-run preview that prints exactly what would be removed or reset, which is useful now because the repo is already sitting in a partially migrated state.
suggestions.prompt: Harden `【MacOS】⏬下载配置当前Git子模块.command` for first use. Add a preview-oriented mode that shows which submodule paths, `.gitmodules` entries, and local repos would be removed or reset before destructive steps run, while keeping the current automation flow intact.

suggestions.title: Replace stage 8 with the repo’s submodule bootstrap flow
suggestions.description: Your README and today’s repo sync work now center this project on `【MacOS】⏬下载配置当前Git子模块.command`, but `【MacOS】🆕新系统配置.command` still clones plain `JobsSoftware.MacOS` and `JobsMacEnvVarConfig` into `~/Desktop/JobsKits`. Codex can switch stage 8 to the repo-local submodule path and clean up the stale naming assumptions in one pass.
suggestions.prompt: Update `【MacOS】🆕新系统配置.command` so stage 8 uses this repo’s submodule bootstrap flow instead of cloning `JobsSoftware.MacOS` and `JobsMacEnvVarConfig` into `~/Desktop/JobsKits`. Keep it consistent with `.gitmodules`, `【MacOS】⏬下载配置当前Git子模块.command`, and the current `⏬JobsSoftware.MacOS` naming, then patch the README examples that still assume the old direct-clone flow.

suggestions.title: Make the Xcode simulator step safe while Xcode is open
suggestions.description: You edited the macOS initializer today, and Xcode is running right now. The script still unconditionally wipes Xcode and CoreSimulator caches before `xcodebuild -downloadPlatform iOS`, so Codex can add preflight checks, safer skip behavior, and clearer recovery output before this causes a bad run on the machine you’re actively using.
suggestions.prompt: Harden the `stage_xcode_simulator_assets` part of `【MacOS】🆕新系统配置.command` for real use on an active machine: detect when Xcode or Simulator is open, avoid blindly deleting caches in that case, add an override/skip path, and update the README so the behavior is documented clearly.
